title: Query and reconcile ledger actuals
preconditions: The local Ledger is readable; filter semantics and date/sign conventions are discoverable.
postconditions: Repeated equivalent queries over unchanged data return the same transaction membership and exact total; all pages for one cursor retain first-page membership; empty results are explicit successful results.
main_flow: 1. The agent submits explicit filters and output contract version. 2. Tally validates the filter combination. 3. Tally selects canonical transactions using the Effective Date, category-allocation, transfer, refund/reversal, and correction rules. 4. Tally establishes one immutable result snapshot containing transaction membership and exact total, then returns the first page plus a snapshot-bound cursor when needed. 5. Later pages read the same snapshot even if new writes occur; an unavailable snapshot fails explicitly. 6. The agent reconciles the total to that selected set. 7. BUDGET and INSIGHTS consume this public result rather than duplicate financial rules.
alt_flows: 2a. Date range, account, category or state filter is invalid -> reject with structured errors
3a. The store fails integrity validation -> fail rather than report a potentially false total
4a. Results exceed one response -> return a snapshot-bound deterministic cursor and unchanged total
5a. The snapshot is expired or unavailable -> fail explicitly; never continue against live membership
6a. Selected transaction amounts do not equal the reported total -> treat as an integrity failure
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The owner needs trustworthy transactions or actual totals for a period, account, category, transfer state, or categorization state.","status":"draft"}
